arts.ttl: Liverpool 'close in' on HUGE first summer transfer as double deal for Van Dijk replacement lined up
arts.sum: Liverpool are aware they may have a lot of work to do in the transfer market to build on this campaign with a number of first team players on course to leave this summer, including the out-of-contract trio Trent Alexander-Arnold, Mohamed Salah and Virgil van Dijk. arts.ttl: David Raya hails ‘unstoppable’ Arsenal teammate – ‘Very intelligent’ player deserves praise
arts.sum: Arsenal goalkeeper David Raya has hailed ‘unstoppable’ Mikel Merino, praising the midfielder for his adaptation into a false nine. Marca cover comments from the Arsenal goalkeeper today after an appearance on La Tribu, where he discussed various matters ahead of the international break. arts.ttl: Grimaldo wants to return to Spain: "Even the club know it"
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen's Alejandro Grimaldo has confirmed that he'd like to return to Spain. The only question, it seems, is when it's going to happen.

arts.sum: Spain continue their defence of the UEFA Nations League with a quarter-final tie against the Netherlands.
